headline: Strength Seen in Erie Indemnity (ERIE): Can Its 7.5% Jump Turn into More Strength?
summary: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.

headline: Parnassus Growth Equity Fund Q2 2026 Portfolio Activity
summary: Twist Bioscience provides exposure to two powerful long-term trends in Health Care, AI-supported drug discovery and next-generation sequencing.
